title: Ranks Datapack
description: This datapack provides you more than 30 unique ranks for your Minecraft server. It allows to server owners to easily assign roles to players. The datapack also includes an option to create your own custom ranks.
body:
# [​Ranks datapack +1.21]:

This datapack provides you more than 30 unique ranks for your Minecraft server. It allows server owners to easily assign roles to players. The datapack also includes an explanation to create personalized custom ranks.

- Datapack tested and developed on Minecraft 1.21.5.

- If you find a bug, have any question or suggestion, let me know in the planet minecraft webpage comments [[Click Here]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/ranks-datapack/).

IMPORTANT!
On Spigot or Bukkit servers, ranks may not appear on chat and server list due to a bug in these engines.

Also the datapack includes a uninstall function, in case you want to uninstall it, execute the following command:

```
/function creeperx365:ranks/uninstall/uninstall
```
